MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center, a California Nonprofit is present. Represented by Tony Baldwin and Douglas Gary.
Attorney Michael Rossoff appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Dana Derrick is present.
Attorney Betty Hsu-Nordstedt representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Margi Lariviere, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was not filed. The trial date of Aug -06-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
